data.title: Crunchbase: Ecommerce funding hits a low in 2025
data.description: So far this year, global ecommerce-related startups have raised around $7.3 billion, according to Crunchbase.

data.title: Massimo Group debuts new ecommerce platform
data.description: Behind the scenes, the platform is connected to Massimo’s NetSuite ERP system, allowing the company to synchronize online orders, dealer allocations, and inventory availability in real time.

data.title: Amazon Business pushes AI deeper into procurement at Reshape 2025
data.description: Shelley Salomon, Amazon Business’ global vice president, used her keynote to describe a shift away from procurement systems that rely on manual search, fragmented approvals and reactive spend reviews.

data.title: Google debuts agentic checkout and AI Mode shopping features for the holidays
data.description: Wayfair, Chewy and some Shopify merchants will be among the first to leverage Google's agentic checkout options.

data.title: Elastic Path expands commerce platform with native search, CMS and hosted frontend
data.description: The update marks a step toward what the company calls its “intelligent commerce” vision — embedding artificial intelligence throughout the commerce stack.
